home_h2_4:
Swimwear born from the sea
and the moment after
home_h3_7: Designs that combine confidence, comfort and beach style — because every moment on the beach deserves to be perfect.
home_p_16: At Heatwave we believe that good swimwear is much more than a piece of fabric — it's self-expression, confidence, and feeling. Every item in our collection is carefully designed to flatter the body, survive a full day at sea, and look perfect in photos too. Because you deserve swimwear that feels like a second skin.
home_p_17: Every design is calculated for the real body — with cuts that highlight the right points, defined waists, and seams that flatter every size. Brazilian swimwear that feels like it was tailored for you.
home_p_18: We carefully choose durable fabrics that are soft on the skin and resistant to chlorine and salt. Complete swimwear that stays beautiful season after season — because true quality is felt in every touch.
home_p_19: Designed for your life — from morning diving, to afternoon shakes, to photos that will last. Every detail, from straps to ties, is calculated so you look and feel perfect in every moment.
home_p_20: Our swimwear is designed to feel like second skin — for the beach, the sea, and moments worth capturing.
home_p_21: "The Brazilian swimsuit I ordered simply changed my entire beach experience. It holds in place exactly as it should, the fabric is soft and amazing, and every photo I took came out as if I did a professional shoot."
home_p_22: "I finally found a complete swimsuit that both looks stunning and feels comfortable throughout the day. The quality of the fabric is noticeable from the first moment — doesn't shrink, doesn't fade. I've already ordered three colors!"
home_p_23: "I was skeptical about buying swimwear online, but Heatwave completely convinced me. The sizes are accurate, the service is amazing, and the feeling that the product was designed for me personally. Highly recommend to everyone!"
home_p_24: We're here to help — whether you have questions about styling, want to hear about new swimwear collections, or are simply looking for the Brazilian swimsuit that will make your summer. We'd love to hear from you.
home_p_25: Fashion that feels like sunshine on the skin — clothes born from the sea, for life beyond it.

contact_h1_1:
We're always happy
to hear from you
contact_h2_2: We'd love to hear from you
contact_p_13: Whether you have a question about swimwear, need help choosing the right style, business collaboration, or any other topic — we're here for you. Our team at Heatwave loves to help and is waiting to hear from you.
contact_p_14: Do you have a question about sizes? Looking for a one-piece swimsuit that fits you perfectly? Want to hear about collaborations or our brand?
contact_p_15: We respond to every inquiry warmly and quickly — usually within one business day.
contact_p_16: We're here for you — whether you have a question about swimwear, want to collaborate, or just want to say hello.
contact_p_17: For any question regarding swimwear, orders, sizes, or returns — we're happy to help. The Heatwave team usually responds within one business day.
contact_p_18: Designers, photographers, influencers, and brands — we're open to creative collaborations that fit the Heatwave spirit. Tell us about your vision.
contact_p_19: Follow us for inspiration, collection updates and behind-the-scenes moments. Tag us in your swimwear and we'll be happy to share.
contact_p_20: We're here for you — from selection to purchase. Hear from customers who have already experienced the Heatwave experience.
contact_p_21: I bought a Brazilian swimsuit for vacation and I just couldn't believe it — perfect fit, color exactly like in the picture, and shipping arrived faster than I expected. The personal service I received in chat helped me choose the right size and I'm already ordering again.
contact_p_22: I was looking for a one-piece swimsuit that would be both elegant and comfortable for the beach — and I found exactly that at Heatwave. The fabric quality is amazing, and the feeling that this is a brand that truly understands swimwear fashion is really noticeable. I'll definitely be back next season!

fit_fabric_h1_1: The best for your body — swimwear that feels like a second skin
fit_fabric_h2_4: Everything you wanted to know about our swimwear
fit_fabric_h3_6: Fabrics that feel amazing on the skin
fit_fabric_p_24: At Heatwave we believe that good swimwear is much more than just clothing. It's a feeling of confidence, freedom, and comfort — whether you're in motion, in the sea, or just enjoying the sun.
fit_fabric_p_25: Swim bras with ergonomic design that provide real support for every size, without compromising on appearance.
fit_fabric_p_26: We choose only quality fabrics — soft, resistant to chlorine and sun, and with elasticity that maintains its shape.
fit_fabric_p_27: Every model undergoes a fit test so you can swim, jump, and be yourself — without thinking about the garment.
fit_fabric_p_28: Every piece of our swimwear is carefully designed to combine comfort, function and aesthetics — so you feel perfect in every moment on the beach
fit_fabric_p_29: Our fabric stretches in all directions and returns to its original shape again and again. Whether you're swimming, surfing or just enjoying the sun — the garment stays in place without stretching or losing its shape.
fit_fabric_p_30: The precise cut and light padding technology create gentle support that flatters your natural silhouette. One-piece or Brazilian swimsuit — every design considers the body in the most elegant way.
fit_fabric_p_31: Our advanced fabric wicks moisture quickly and dries almost instantly. You can get out of the water and continue your day in complete comfort — without the feeling of heaviness and wetness that accompanies regular swimwear.
fit_fabric_p_32: When the garment fits exactly as it should, confidence comes naturally. Our designs are chosen to highlight the right lines and give you the feeling that you're exactly where you should be — on the beach and beyond.
fit_fabric_p_33: Every piece of swimwear we offer goes through a calculated process of selection, design and balance — so you feel exactly as you deserve to feel on the beach.
fit_fabric_p_34: We believe that good swimwear starts long before it reaches your hands. Every fabric is carefully chosen — resistance to chlorine, seawater and sun, along with a soft and pleasant feel on the skin. We work with lycra fabrics, recycled nylon and special weaves that maintain their shape even after prolonged use in the sea and pool.
fit_fabric_p_35: The silhouette is the soul of every swimsuit. We spend a lot of time thinking about lines — where they flatter, where they elongate, and how they create harmony with a real body in motion. Brazilian swimsuit, one-piece swimsuit, classic bikini — each cut is designed separately to serve the wearer in the best way.
fit_fabric_p_36: The final stage is the most important question: does the garment feel as good as it looks? We believe that beautiful swimwear shouldn't be uncomfortable. So every model undergoes wear tests, including precise elasticity, flat seams that don't irritate, and padding that stays in place — in the sea, in the pool and all the way from the beach to the café.
fit_fabric_p_37: From materials to care, from size fitting to what makes our collection unique — we've gathered the most important answers for you in one place.
fit_fabric_p_38: We recommend measuring bust, waist and hip circumference and comparing to our size chart. A Brazilian swimsuit, for example, tends to be cut high on the hip so it's better to choose according to hip size. If you're between two sizes, it's better to go up one size.
fit_fabric_p_39: Our collection is made from quality lycra fabric with 80% nylon and 20% elastane. The fabric is resistant to chlorine, sunscreen oil and seawater, maintains its color over time and dries quickly.
fit_fabric_p_40: Most models include removable inner cups for gentle support. Some models come with built-in underwire for enhanced support — this detail is specified on the product page of each item.
fit_fabric_p_41: It's recommended to hand wash the swimsuit in cold water immediately after use, especially after exposure to chlorine or seawater. Avoid washing machine, dryer and strong wringing. Flat drying in shade will preserve the fabric shape and color over time.
fit_fabric_p_42: A one-piece swimsuit covers the entire body and is suitable for active swimming and women looking for full coverage. A Brazilian swimsuit is characterized by a high cut on the hip and minimal back, and is designed for those who love a bold look and elongated body lines.
fit_fabric_p_43: Every item in the collection is designed with attention to detail: flat seams that don't cause irritation, colors chosen to withstand the sun, and cuts that flatter a variety of body types. We believe that good swimwear is one that feels good — not just looks good.
fit_fabric_p_44: Fashion that feels like sunshine on the skin — clothes born from the sea, for life beyond it.
fit_fabric_p_45: New collections, styling tips and more — straight to your inbox.
brand_story_h1_1: Born from our love of the sea
brand_story_h2_3:
From beach to lens —
The aesthetics of Heatwave
brand_story_h2_4:
Let's talk —
Together we create beautiful things
brand_story_h3_5: Confidence that starts with the cut
brand_story_p_11: Heatwave was born from a single moment on the beach — when we realized that a good swimsuit is not just a piece of fabric, but a statement. A statement of confidence, of femininity, of freedom. We believe that every woman deserves to feel beautiful and comfortable by the sea, so we've curated a collection of swimwear that combines contemporary design with a wearing experience you won't want to take off.
brand_story_p_12: From beach to café, from pool to sunset — every piece is carefully selected so you feel at home in your body, in every moment of summer.
brand_story_p_13: Every swimsuit we design is born from three fundamental principles — because we believe that good swimwear is much more than fabric and seams.
brand_story_p_14: Every swimsuit of ours is designed to flatter the real body — not the imaginary one. We believe that the right cut is the one that makes you leave the closet with a smile, without thinking twice.
brand_story_p_15: We choose fabrics that feel good on the skin — soft, durable, with a texture that tells a story. Because a real Brazilian swimsuit doesn't just look beautiful in a photo, it feels like a second skin on a sunny day.
brand_story_p_16: We design for the woman who breathes easily by the sea — who wants to look stunning without effort. Our swimwear combines coastal classics with delicate design details that speak of taste and freedom.
brand_story_p_17: Heatwave was born from love for these moments: a quiet beach morning, golden light spreading over the water, and the feeling of the right fabric on the skin. Every swimsuit we design is a memory waiting to happen — calculated details, flattering cuts, and colors that speak the language of summer.
brand_story_p_18: We believe that good swimwear is much more than clothing — it's a mood. From the Brazilian cut that liberates and empowers, to the complete garment that allows you to move freely, every piece in the collection is chosen with intention. This is your style, this is your sun.
brand_story_p_19: In the language of waves, when sand touches skin and sunlight wraps around you — this is the moment when you are simply yourself. Swimwear born so you feel beautiful, free, and complete!
brand_story_p_20: Heatwave was created from a simple belief: that every woman deserves to feel confident and beautiful by the water — whether at the beach, by the pool, or on a dream vacation. Every swimsuit of ours is designed so you shine.
brand_story_p_22: Looking for collaboration, press coverage, or just want to talk about swimwear and beach fashion? We're here for every question, suggestion, and creative conversation. We'd love to hear from you.
brand_story_p_23: Fashion that feels like sunshine on skin — clothes born from the sea, for life beyond it.
brand_story_p_24: New collections, styling tips and more — straight to your inbox.
contact_quote_76: I bought a Brazilian swimsuit for vacation and I just couldn't believe it — perfect fit, color exactly like in the picture, and shipping arrived faster than I expected. The personal service I received in chat helped me choose the right size and I'm already ordering again.
contact_quote_77: I was looking for a one-piece swimsuit that would be both elegant and comfortable for the beach — and I found exactly that at Heatwave. The fabric quality is amazing, and the feeling that this is a brand that truly understands swimwear fashion is really noticeable. I'll definitely be back next season!

[business_name] is committed to making services accessible to the general public. We work to implement the Israeli standard 
            (IS 5568) guidelines based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.

legal_accessibility_p_10:
We believe in equal rights and in every person's right to receive information and services independently and equally. 
            This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.
legal_accessibility_p_11: The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA standard, which includes:
legal_accessibility_p_13: We work continuously to improve website accessibility and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.
legal_accessibility_p_14: If you encountered an accessibility issue on the website or need assistance, please contact us:
legal_accessibility_p_15: Response times: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.
legal_accessibility_p_16: Complaints: You can file a complaint with the Ministry of Justice - Commissioner for Equal Rights of Persons with Disabilities
